sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ خَالِدٌ لُغَةَ الْبَرْمَجَةِ فِي الْمَدْرَسَةِ الصَّيْفِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid je naučio programski jezik u ljetnoj školi.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid learned a programming language at summer school.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ خَالِدٌ بَرْنَامَجًا بَسِيطًا لِحِسَابِ مِسَاحَةِ الْمُرَبَّعِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid je napisao jednostavan program za izračunavanje površine kvadrata.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid wrote a simple program to calculate the area of a square.

sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ مُبَرْمِجًا نَاجِحًا فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ لِيَبْنِيَ مَوَاقِعَ إِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: On želi postati uspješan programer u budućnosti kako bi pravio web stranice.
sentences.translationEn: He wants to become a successful programmer in the future to build websites.
